plugins.name: openclaw-frontier-stack
plugins.description: Interoperable agent skills + hooks + orchestration harness. 87 skills (47 marketing + creative, 37 engineering workflow, 3 operator), 11 role contracts, engineer CLI with goal templating + state persistence + ticketing v2, live agent runner, 4 coordination patterns plus subagent fan-out, goal v3 (failure-recovery, sub-goals, gantt, diff, cancellation), 5 autonomous loops, Rust core workspace with N-API FFI, reference-runtime system layer (cron, doctor, webhook, supply-chain advisory, event-hook lifecycle), graded release-gate with mutation testing and live-model scorecards, and a multi-host agent integration installer.
